properties.name: Bridge Off-Ramp
properties.description: Hit the broken ramp on the south bridge at 95+ mph.

properties.name: Construction Plank
properties.description: Use a fast bike, hit the angled plank head-on.

properties.name: Mall Skylight
properties.description: Drive up the parking garage ramp and through the skylight.

properties.name: Hotel Pool
properties.description: Launch off the parking garage into the rooftop pool.

properties.name: Drawbridge Gap
properties.description: Time it for when the bridge is just starting to lift.
